questionText: Find all pairs in an array that sum to a given target, optimized using two pointers

Sort an array containing only 0s, 1s, and 2s in a single pass without extra space

Find the shortest path in a graph where edges alternate between two colors
Solve a medium-difficulty dynamic programming problem involving optimal subsequence selection
Implement binary search on an unsorted array using a randomized pivot instead of the standard midpoint
Given a string, repeatedly remove the first occurrence of a specific adjacent character pair until none remain
Find the lowest common ancestor of two nodes in a binary tree
Perform a topological sort on a dependency graph using DFS
Solve an interval-based dynamic programming problem, such as optimal matrix chain multiplication
Design a distributed key-value store, covering consistent hashing, sharding, and replication strategy
Detect whether a linked list contains a loop
Find the first non-repeating character in a string
Find the maximum sum of a contiguous subarray
Design an alarm system where users can create, update, and delete alarms, with a mechanism to trigger them at the scheduled time
Given a circular doubly linked list where one node's pointer is broken, identify and fix the broken link

Count the number of islands in a grid using depth-first search
Design a URL shortening service, covering the encoding scheme and storage approach
Given a nearly sorted array where each element is at most k positions from its sorted position, sort it efficiently using a min-heap
Find the maximum of the minimum values for every window size k in a given array
Design a data structure supporting insert, delete, and get-random-element operations in O(1) time
Solve a 0/1 knapsack variant where you maximize player rating within a fixed budget
Solve an extension of the Minimum Spanning Tree problem with additional constraints
Find the smallest window in a string that contains all characters of another given string, including duplicates
Design a simplified ticket-booking system like BookMyShow, including schema design and handling concurrent seat bookings
Given 10,000 seats and 1,000 simultaneous booking requests, design a system that handles concurrency without overselling
Find the missing number in an array using an approach that avoids integer overflow
Given a set of valid words and an input string, determine if the string can be segmented into a sequence of valid words
Given two binary trees, determine whether the second is a subtree of the first
Add two numbers represented as linked lists and return the result as a new linked list
Given an array representing tower heights, calculate the maximum amount of rainwater that can be trapped between them
Determine whether two binary search trees are identical
Find the maximum rectangular area under a histogram of building heights
Given a string, remove k characters to minimize the sum of squares of the remaining character frequencies
Check whether a binary tree is a valid binary search tree without using extra memory
Find a sub-array of 0s and 1s where flipping the bits maximizes the number of 1s
Rearrange a singly linked list so all even numbers appear before all odd numbers
Given a sorted array, construct a height-balanced binary search tree from it
Given a 2D binary matrix sorted row-wise and column-wise, find the row with the maximum number of 1s
Find the k largest-selling items from a large file of sales records using a min-heap
Given n employees each with a rating, distribute the minimum candies such that higher-rated neighbors get more candy
Construct a binary tree from its preorder and inorder traversal sequences
Given a string of parentheses, find the minimum number of insertions needed to make it valid
Find the median of two sorted arrays of different sizes
Solve the longest common subsequence problem between two strings
Design a distributed rate limiter that works correctly across multiple servers
Find the top k frequent elements in a stream using limited extra space
Design a low-level cache system supporting get, put, and eviction
Given a directed graph of process dependencies, detect if a deadlock cycle exists
Given entry and exit times of visitors, find the time instant with the maximum number of people present
Determine how many adjacent character swaps are needed to make a given string a palindrome
Given pairs of relative heights between elements, determine a valid ordering or detect a contradiction
Find the second largest element in an array without sorting it
Design a system where multiple partners can register companies with differing sets of attributes for a shared rating engine
Given a pattern and a target string, find the smallest substring of the target containing all pattern characters including duplicates
Given ordering constraints between tasks, determine a valid execution order using topological sort
Design a read-write lock that allows multiple simultaneous readers but only one writer at a time
Print the nodes of a binary tree in an anticlockwise spiral order
Find the median of two sorted arrays of different lengths
Find the maximum product of a contiguous subarray, given both positive and negative integers
Remove all half nodes (nodes with exactly one child) from a binary tree
Given a 2D array of 0s and 1s, count the number of rectangles with 1s at all four corners
Given an array of positive and negative integers, find the two values with the highest absolute sum
Given a stream of numbers where each is at most k positions from its sorted position, sort it efficiently
Find the length of a linked list that contains a cycle
Given two jars of 5L and 3L capacity, determine a sequence of steps to measure exactly 4L of water
Rotate a square matrix 90 degrees clockwise in place
Print the top view of a binary tree

Design an inventory alert system for a medicine shop that raises an alarm when stock falls below a threshold
